Entries.Name: Bing Search in Start Menu
Entries.Description: Bing search results in Start Menu
Entries.Detail: The Start Menu search box can show Bing web results alongside local results. Disabling keeps Start Menu search local only.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Bing search results in Start Menu are enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: The Start Menu search box can show Bing web results alongside local results. Disabling keeps Start Menu search local only.

Entries.Name: Start Menu Account Notifications
Entries.Description: Microsoft account notifications on Start Menu
Entries.Detail: Microsoft can show account-related notifications and prompts in the Start Menu. Hiding removes these.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Microsoft account notifications shown in Start Menu
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Microsoft can show account-related notifications and prompts in the Start Menu. Hiding removes these.

Entries.Name: Start Menu Recommendations/Tips
Entries.Description: Recommendations for tips, shortcuts, new apps in Start
Entries.Detail: The Start Menu can show tips about Windows features and recommendations for new apps. Hiding removes these suggestions.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Recommendations and tips shown in Start Menu
Entries.WhyThisMatters: The Start Menu can show tips about Windows features and recommendations for new apps. Hiding removes these suggestions.

Entries.Name: Web Search in System Search
Entries.Description: Web search integration in system search
Entries.Detail: Integrates Bing web results into the Windows search bar. Disabling makes system search show only local files and settings.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Web search integrated into system search is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Integrates Bing web results into the Windows search bar. Disabling makes system search show only local files and settings.

Entries.Name: Start Layout
Entries.Detail: Controls the layout ratio of the Windows 11 Start Menu between pinned apps and recommended content.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls the layout ratio of the Windows 11 Start Menu between pinned apps and recommended content.

Entries.Name: Start Menu Recommended Section
Entries.Detail: Shows or hides the Recommended section at the bottom of the Start Menu. On Enterprise and Education editions this can be hidden via policy.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Recommended section shown in Start Menu
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Shows or hides the Recommended section at the bottom of the Start Menu. On Enterprise and Education editions this can be hidden via policy.
